17: Social Harmony Spent thirty minutes scrolling through a trending hashtag to decide which brand of electrolyte water to buy at the gas station.

28: Social Harmony Spent my entire forty-minute lunch break scrolling through 'day in the life' vlogs of other delivery drivers to see if I was using the correct type of phone mount, eventually ordering the one that appeared in three different videos.

30: Social harmony and risk avoidance Spent over an hour reading conflicting reviews for a viral 'productivity' water bottle because everyone in the office group chat bought one.
